message:
fix(websocket): correct RFC 6455 masking in frame codec tests

Frame encode/decode tests used FrameCodec::server() for both encoding
and decoding, but per RFC 6455 a server decoder expects masked frames
(client→server). Fixed by using client codec for encoding and server
codec for decoding, matching the actual wire protocol roles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
